rulings.Case Title: GANE SUGALI VS. OCEAN AVENUE REAL ESTATE FUND, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31 , 2023 line 1. PLAINTIFF GANE SUGALI NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY OF STIPULATED JUDGMENT is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SHAWNY K. WILLIAMS VS. SHANDA LOVE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order To Stay Enforcement Of Summary Judgment And Any Writ Of Possession Pending Appeal ***Filed Pursuant To Litigants Request***
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October 31, 2023 line 4. DEFENDANT SHANDA LOVE, SHANNON WILLIAMS, MASHAMA NOLAN MTN FOR ORDER TO STAY ENFORCEMENT OF SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ANY WRIT OF POSSESSION PENDING APPEAL is GRANTED pursuant to CCP 918 and 1176. The Court recognizes that the Notice of Appeal was filed after the Summary Judgment Order and before Plaintiff obtained a judgment thereon. However, the Judgment is now on file and it is appealable. In accordance with CCP 1176 defendants present evidence of hardship with their October 2, 2023 filing. Plaintiff presents no evidence of hardship. Pursuant to CCP 1176 any stay of appeal is subject to mandatory posting on fair market rental value. In this case the only evidence of such value is provided by the Plaintiffs and is $3,800. No later than November 1, 2023 Defendants to post with the Court $3,800 and thereafter to post $3,800 on the first day of each month (or the first business day after the first day of each month) for the duration of the appeal. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
